parentQuestion: A patient presents with severe muscle weakness and exercise intolerance. Lab tes...

scaffolds.explain: Mitochondria are the 'powerhouses' that produce ATP — the cell's energy currency — through aerobic respiration. They're your cellular power plants, darling.

scaffolds.q: Lactic acid is produced during ___ when oxygen is scarce.
scaffolds.explain: When oxygen is limited, cells perform glycolysis and convert pyruvate to lactate (lactic acid) to regenerate NAD+ and keep glycolysis running. It's metabolic desperation, darling — not efficient, but it keeps you alive.
